LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SYSCO SA FRANCISCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ITS CLAIM AGAINST IBRAHIM HAMAMI, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA STAR RESTAURANT. (CCP 484.090.) THE OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT IDENTIFIES THE ACCOUNT HOLDER AS "STAR RESTAURANT", AND NOT MR. HAMAMI. (ABLEMAN DECL., EXHIBIT A.) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT MR. HAMAMI DOES BUSINESS AS STAR RESTAURANT. IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT MR. HAMAMI SIGNED A PERSONAL GUARANTY. (FIRST AM. COMPLAINT, 14, EXHIBIT B.) HOWEVER, EXHIBIT B IS NOT ATTACHED TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. FURTHERMORE, THE COMPLAINT IS NOT VERIFIED AS AVERRED IN THE APPLICATION. (COMPARE COMPLAINT; WITH APPLICATION, 7A, COOK DECL., P. 1:10-11.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Continued To May-28-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SA FRANCISCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is denied. Plaintiff has not established the probable validity of its claim against Ibrahim Hamami, individually and dba Star Restaurant. (CCP 484.090.) The open book account identifies the account holder as "Star Restaurant", and not Mr. Hamami. (Ableman Decl., Exhibit A.) Plaintiff has not presented sufficient evidence to demonstrate that Mr. Hamami does business as Star Restaurant. In the First Amended Complaint, Plaintiff alleges that Mr. Hamami signed a personal guaranty. (First Am. Complaint, 14, Exhibit B.) However, Exhibit B is not attached to the First Amended Complaint. Furthermore, the Complaint is not verified as averred in the Application. (Compare Complaint; with Application, 7a, Cook Decl., p. 1:10-11.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
